# Prompt Anatomy — AI Operating System for Teams
# Canonical marketing and demo site: https://promptanatomy.site/

> Prompt Anatomy is an AI Operating System for modern teams. It helps organizations move from random prompting to structured, repeatable AI workflows — across learning, daily work, automation, marketing, HR, operations, and executive decision-making.
>
> Less random prompting. More structured execution.

## Primary page (cite this)
- https://promptanatomy.site/
  - Nine-domain ecosystem overview (Enter → Use → Create → Hire → Manage → Decide → Deepen → Play)
  - Interactive prompt builder (5-layer structured prompts)
  - Team AI maturity assessment (3 tiers)

## Site sections (hash deep links)
- https://promptanatomy.site/#ecosystem — ecosystem map and domain detail panel (nine domains)
- https://promptanatomy.site/#anatomizer — 5-layer structured prompt builder (Anatomizer)
- https://promptanatomy.site/#maturity — team AI maturity diagnostic (3 questions, 3 tiers)

## Platform hub (product CTAs)
- https://promptanatomy.app/ — Central AI Operating System; 600+ templates, 60 evaluated AI tools, 100-term glossary

## Ecosystem domains (external; separate sites)
- https://promptanatomy.app/ — Main Platform / Central AI Operating System
- https://promptanatomy.cloud/ — 1. Enter / Onboarding & Core Basics
- https://promptanatomy.info/ — 2. Use / Daily Automation Library
- https://promptanatomy.space/ — 3. Create / Marketing & PR OS
- https://promptanatomy.help/ — 4. Hire / HR & People Operations
- https://promptanatomy.ceo/ — 5. Manage / Strategic Leadership Hub
- https://promptanatomy.pro/ — 6. Decide / Enterprise Scaling Engine
- https://promptanatomy.blog/ — 7. Deepen / Systems Thinker Knowledge Hub
- https://promptanatomy.lol/ — 8. Play / Experiment & Exploration Lab
